The Boris Hristov House of Culture and the Orpheus Summer Cinema are preparing a truly eventful month, filled with numerous concerts and performances

Having recently published the full summer program of the Ancient Theater for 2026, we now turn our attention to the first hot month of the year.

EVENTS IN JUNE IN BORIS HRISTOV:

02.06.2026 – 7 pm – Annual dance performance "The Second Pulse" by Era Ballet

09.06.2026 – 7 pm – benefit concert "Our Song Remains" by the sextet "Bambini"
